management.empty_filtered_description: Try adjusting or clearing your filters to see more results

groups.empty_description: A group is a named set of documents you can run a trial against. Create one to run an extraction on a specific selection of documents.
groups.cannot_delete_tooltip: Cannot delete — this group is used by a trial
groups.also_delete_documents: Also delete all documents in this group (if not referenced elsewhere)
groups.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
groups.delete_contains: This group contains {count} document. | This group contains {count} documents.

group_form.description_placeholder: Describe the purpose of this document group...

group_view.download_all_message: This will download all {count} documents as a ZIP archive.

viewer.restore_message: This makes the selected version the latest again. Nothing is reprocessed.

extraction.desc_text_no_ocr: Extracted from embedded PDF text (no OCR)
extraction.desc_force_ocr: Full-page OCR forced (even if embedded text exists)
extraction.desc_mistral: Processed with Mistral AI OCR API

batch.reprocess_note: Reprocessing runs on the whole source file, not individual rows — selecting documents from a row-by-row CSV/XLSX import reprocesses every row of that file.
batch.warning_title: Warning: This action cannot be undone
batch.deps_preview_unavailable: Usage preview is unavailable for selections over {limit} {entity} — the option above still applies to the whole selection.
batch.in_use_by: In use by {impact}. Enable the option above to remove them too, otherwise deletion will be blocked.
batch.confirm_permanent: I understand that this action is permanent
batch.cascade_files: Also delete produced documents and their trials and extraction results, and remove them from groups
batch.cascade_default: Also delete related trials and extraction results, and remove the documents from groups
batch.warn_trials: The selected trials and their results will be permanently deleted.
batch.warn_files: The selected files and their preprocessing results will be permanently deleted.
batch.warn_documents: The selected documents and their preprocessing results will be permanently deleted.
batch.toast_no_files: Could not resolve the selected documents to any files.
batch.toast_reprocess_started: Reprocessing task started for {count} file | Reprocessing task started for {count} files
batch.toast_export_stub: Export functionality would be implemented here
batch.toast_action_failed: Failed to complete the action on the selected {entity}.
batch.hint_manage: Go to the Document Groups tab to manage.

toasts.group_no_longer_exists: That document group no longer exists — showing all documents instead.

toasts.cannot_delete_group: Cannot delete group - it is used by a trial
toasts.group_and_docs_deleted: Group and {count} document deleted | Group and {count} documents deleted
toasts.group_deleted_docs_referenced: Group deleted, but documents could not be deleted (referenced elsewhere).

view.subtitle: Compare trial results against ground truth data

view.select_gt_prompt: Select a ground truth file to start evaluation
view.no_evaluations: No evaluations yet. Select a trial to evaluate.

concepts.title: How evaluation works
concepts.ground_truth_desc: — a file with the correct extracted values to compare trial results against.
concepts.field_mapping_desc: — links each ground-truth column to the matching schema field so values can be compared.
concepts.id_field_desc: — the column that uniquely identifies each document, so each extraction is matched to its correct row.

list.unmatched_tooltip: {count} document(s) could not be matched to ground truth and are excluded from the accuracy.

delete.title: Delete evaluation?
delete.message: This removes the computed metrics for {trial}. The trial and its results are kept; you can re-evaluate anytime.

prerequisites.select_gt: Please select a ground truth file first.
prerequisites.configure_mappings: Configure field mappings for the selected ground truth file to enable evaluation.
prerequisites.resolve_error: Resolve the current error before starting evaluation.

validation.select_gt: Please select a ground truth file
validation.no_mappings: Ground truth file has no field mappings configured

analysis.matched_only_tooltip: Accuracy is computed over matched documents only. Unmatched documents are listed in the table below.
analysis.unscored_docs: {errorCount} of {totalCount} document(s) could not be scored (no ground-truth match) and are excluded from the accuracy above.
analysis.categorical_tooltip: Categorical field — select it to view its confusion matrix

confusion.caption_intro: Each cell shows the document count and its share of the ground-truth row. The diagonal (correct predictions) is green, errors are red — intensity scales with count.
confusion.caption_click: Click a cell (or focus it with Tab and press Enter)
confusion.caption_outro: to filter the document table; the selected cell is outlined in blue.
confusion.cell_title: {gt} → {pred}: {count} document(s) — {pct}% of GT row ({verdict}). Click to filter.

drawer.no_preview: No preview available for this file type. Showing extracted text instead — but none was extracted during preprocessing.
drawer.no_result: No structured result was produced for this document.
drawer.no_reasoning: No reasoning content was captured for this document.

export.title: Export Evaluation Report
export.select_one: Please select at least one evaluation to export.
export.large_warning: Includes original document/ground-truth files — the archive may be large.
export.select_one_toast: Please select at least one evaluation to export

batch.needs_config_title: {files} need(s) import configuration — click to configure

cancel_task.message: Any files still being processed will be marked as failed.

cancel_upload.message: Files already uploaded will be kept; the rest of the batch will not be uploaded.

config.footer_note: This will create a new preprocessing run. Existing runs and documents are preserved.
config.force_ocr_desc: Skip embedded text extraction and run OCR on all PDF pages
config.leave_empty_default: Leave empty to use server default
config.needs_config_hint: Click "Configure" next to each file above to set up import settings before preprocessing.
config.no_ocr_desc: CSV, Excel and plain-text files are imported as structured text — they don't use an OCR engine. Just start processing.
config.ocr_required_desc: PDF and image files need an OCR engine. Enable Local OCR, Mistral OCR, or Vision LLM in Admin Settings — or remove those files and process only CSV/Excel/text files, which don't require OCR.
config.ocr_required_title: Selected files require OCR, but no OCR engine is enabled.

dropzone.aria_label: Upload files — drop files here or activate to browse
dropzone.prompt: Drop files here or click to upload

duplicate.diff_config_desc: The following files have existing documents with a different OCR configuration. Running preprocessing will create additional documents (not replace existing ones). Both versions will be preserved.
duplicate.embedded_desc: The following PDF file(s) have embedded text. Since "Force OCR" is not enabled, the embedded text will be extracted directly regardless of the selected OCR engine. The result will be identical to previous extractions.
duplicate.existing_diff_config: {count} existing document with different config | {count} existing documents with different config
duplicate.existing_same_config: {count} existing document with same config will be archived | {count} existing documents with same config will be archived
duplicate.same_config_after: . Running preprocessing will create new versions and archive the old ones. Archived documents are hidden by default but can be viewed in the document history.
duplicate.same_config_before: The following files have existing documents with the
duplicate.skip_existing_desc: Skip files that already have documents for this OCR configuration. Useful if you want to process only new files or re-process files where OCR quality was poor.
duplicate.skip_existing_label: Only process files without existing documents
duplicate.summary_existing: file with existing documents | files with existing documents
duplicate.tip_after: in Advanced Options to force OCR on all pages, ignoring embedded text.
duplicate.versioning_after: and can be restored if needed. Only the latest version is shown in the document list by default.

errors.already_processing: One or more files are already being processed
errors.check_duplicates_failed: Failed to check for existing documents

hint.select_files_after: to extract text from your documents.
hint.select_files_before: Select files from the table below, then click

import.all_unique: All {count} IDs in this column are unique.
import.discard_message: Your changes to import configuration will be lost.
import.id_missing_after: was not found with the current settings. Adjust the header/sheet options or pick another column.
import.not_unique: This column is not unique — {rows} rows share a duplicate ID. Each document needs a unique ID, so saving is disabled.
import.not_unique_toast: This ID column is not unique — pick a different column or fix the file.

mapping_list.empty_line2: Select a schema field and a GT field and click
mapping_list.partial_match_hint: Off by default. Substring matching can invert meaning in medical text (e.g. 'cancer' vs 'non-cancer'), so it is opt-in.
mapping_list.hint_type_mismatch: Type mismatch: schema field is {schemaType}, GT column is {gtType}
mapping_list.hint_unusual_method: "{method}" comparison is unusual for a {fieldType} field

id_field.select_id_column_hint: Please select an ID column to enable evaluation.
id_field.match_hint: Controls how documents are matched to trial results for evaluation.

hero.description: Turn unstructured medical and lab documents into validated structured JSON. Define your schema, run LLM extraction trials, and measure accuracy against ground-truth data — with any OpenAI-compatible model, local or hosted.

cta.title: Start extracting structured data
cta.subtitle: Upload your documents, define a schema, and run your first extraction trial.

privacy.title: Privacy-First Design
privacy.description: Run fully local or with self-hosted LLM and OCR providers. No forced external calls — your data stays in your environment.

schema.title: Visual Schema Editor
schema.description: Build nested JSON schemas with a tree-based editor — objects, arrays, and all JSON types. No hand-writing JSON.

ocr.title: Four OCR Engines
ocr.description: Extract text from PDFs, images, or spreadsheets with Docling/Tesseract, Mistral OCR, vision LLMs, or local Docling fallback.

evaluation.title: Accuracy Evaluation
evaluation.description: Compare extracted values to a ground-truth file field by field, with per-field and per-document metrics and confusion matrices.

trials.title: Reproducible Trials
trials.description: Run extraction across document sets with configurable prompts, schemas, models, temperature, and token limits. Compare runs side by side.

api.title: OpenAI-Compatible APIs
api.description: Point trials at any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — OpenAI, Mistral, vLLM, Ollama, or llama.cpp. Mix and match per trial.

step1.title: Upload Medical Documents
step1.format_pdf: PDF documents with text or scanned images

quick.name: Quick (Local OCR)
quick.description: Docling + Tesseract via docling-serve. Uses embedded PDF text when available; no API key needed.

mistral.name: Mistral OCR API
mistral.description: Mistral cloud or self-hosted DeepSeek-OCR-2. Higher accuracy on complex layouts and tables.

vision.name: Vision LLM OCR
vision.description: Any OpenAI-compatible vision model (e.g. GPT-4o, Gemma 4 via vLLM) for layout-aware extraction.

docling.name: Docling
docling.description: IBM's document understanding library — embedded text extraction with optional local fallback.

csv.name: CSV / XLSX
csv.description: Full-document or row-by-row parsing with configurable text and case-ID columns.

step3.title: Document Management
step3.choose_documents: Choose documents for a trial in two ways:

document_features.track: Track OCR engine and origin per document

sets.name: Document Sets
sets.description: Run a trial against an entire group at once

individual.name: Individual Selection
individual.description: Hand-pick specific documents for a trial

upload.title: Upload Ground Truth
upload.description: Provide a CSV/XLSX of validated values

map.title: Map Fields
map.description: Link ground-truth columns to schema fields and comparison methods

demo.heading: See It In Action
demo.disclaimer: Illustrative example — the data and metrics shown are fabricated for demonstration.

overview.subtitle: Create and manage your extraction projects.

no_documents.title: No documents yet
no_documents.body: Preprocess your uploaded files to generate documents. Documents are the extracted text the LLM reads during a trial.

no_trial_documents.title: No documents to run a trial on
no_trial_documents.body: A trial extracts structured data from your documents. Preprocess files first to generate documents.

schema_prompt.body: A trial needs a schema (the fields to extract) and a prompt (extraction instructions). Create both before running a trial.

no_trials.title: No trials to evaluate
no_trials.body: Evaluation compares trial results against ground-truth data. Run a trial first to produce results to evaluate.

delete.warning_including: permanently removes the project and everything in it, including:
delete.warning_suffix: permanently removes the project and everything in it.

grid.heading: Your Projects
grid.empty_body: Create your first project to start uploading documents, running OCR preprocessing, and extracting structured data with LLMs.
grid.no_results_create: Create a project to get started

settings.title: Project Settings
settings.danger_text: Once you delete a project, there is no going back. Be certain.

templates.title: Schema Templates
templates.subtitle: Select a template for common medical document structures

form.mode_hint_simple_text: add extraction fields as a flat list. Switch to Advanced for nested groups, lists, and raw JSON.
form.mode_hint_advanced_text: build nested structures in the visual editor or edit the raw JSON schema directly.
form.developer_options_title: Use JSON Schema type names (String, Object, Array…) and expose advanced field options like formats and constraints.
form.split_view_disabled_title: Split view shows the visual editor and raw JSON side by side — switch to the Visual Editor tab to use it.
form.split_view_title: Show the visual editor and raw JSON side by side.
form.fix_field_names: Fix the highlighted field names first (empty or duplicate names).
form.discard_message: Your schema edits will be lost.
form.invalid_json_format: Invalid JSON format. Please check your schema definition.
form.must_contain_field: Schema must contain at least one field.

delete.title: Delete Prompt
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the prompt "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

toasts.load_failed: Failed to load prompts. Please try again.

list.title: Extraction Prompts
list.subtitle: Configure how the LLM extracts information from documents
list.empty_description: Create a prompt to guide the LLM in extracting information
list.auto_injected_tooltip: No {ph} placeholder — the document text is appended automatically when the trial runs.

view.snapshot_title: Frozen copy of the prompt as it was when the trial ran

form.description_placeholder: Describe what this prompt is designed to extract...
form.instruction_placeholder: Based on the document content, extract these fields:
form.instruction_help: This will be used as the user prompt. The document text and the selected schema are appended automatically when the trial runs.
form.system_from_advanced: This prompt has a system prompt from Advanced mode. It is kept while you edit, but will not be saved while Simple mode is selected.
form.simple_preview_help: In Simple mode no system message is sent — your instruction becomes the user message, with the document and the trial's schema appended:
form.callout_system_text: — the AI's role and rules (applies to every document).
form.callout_replaced: is replaced with the document text.
form.callout_schema_label: The selected schema is automatically included
form.callout_schema_text: when the trial runs, so the model knows which fields to extract. You don't need to paste the schema JSON into your prompt — doing so would duplicate it.
form.system_placeholder: You are an AI assistant specialized in extracting structured information from documents...
form.user_placeholder: Extract the following information from this document:\n\n{ph}
form.discard_message: Your prompt edits will be lost.
form.apply_template_message: Applying the template replaces the current name, description, and prompts.
form.error_at_least_one: At least one prompt (system or user) must be provided
form.error_placeholder_required: The placeholder {ph} must be present in either system or user prompt

simple.title: Extract Fields
simple.subtitle: Drag to reorder • Click field to edit
simple.empty_description: Add fields to define what information to extract from your documents
simple.readonly_notice_before: Fields with nested groups, lists, or advanced settings are read-only here — edit them in
simple.tip_schema: The schema is automatically included in the prompt sent to the LLM
simple.tip_nested: Need nested objects or arrays? Switch to
simple.error_name_required: Name this field or remove it

property.type_tooltip_string: Text field for names, descriptions, etc.
property.boolean_help: This field will capture true/false values. The user interface will show this as a checkbox or toggle switch.
property.add_properties_first: Add properties to this group first
property.default_raw_json: Default values for {type} must be set in raw JSON mode
property.key_invalid: Only letters, numbers and underscores — must not start with a number (e.g., patient_name)

edit_modal.discard_message: Your edits to this property will be lost.

delete_modal.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

help.title: Schema Editor Help
help.tip_click: Click on any field block to edit its properties
help.tip_breadcrumb: Use the navigation breadcrumb to move between nested structures
help.tip_key_after: to add a new field (when not typing in an input)
help.tip_developer: Enable "Developer options" to access more JSON Schema options

trials.title: Trials
trials.subtitle: Run an AI model over your documents to extract structured data, then compare results across trials.

empty.none_description: Run your first extraction trial to see results here.
empty.no_match_description: Try adjusting or clearing your filters to see more trials.

disabled_reason.no_schema: You need at least one schema to start a trial.
disabled_reason.no_document: You need to upload at least one document to start a trial.
disabled_reason.no_prompt: You need to create at least one prompt to start a trial.

toast.cancelled_kept: Trial cancelled — already-processed results were kept
toast.cancelled_discarded: Trial cancelled — in-progress results were discarded

delete_dialog.title: Delete Trial
delete_dialog.message: Deleting this trial also removes its extraction results and any evaluations based on it. This action cannot be undone.

retry_dialog.title: Retry Trial
retry_dialog.message: Start a new trial run with the same configuration? This will consume LLM credits and process all documents again.

create.title: Start New Trial
create.what_is_body: A trial runs an AI model over your documents to extract structured data. You need four things: a Schema (the fields to extract), a Prompt (extraction instructions), a Model (the AI), and the Documents to process. Your schema is automatically included with the prompt — you don't need to describe the fields manually.
create.help_text: A trial runs an AI model over your documents to extract structured data. You need a Schema, a Prompt, a Model, and the Documents to process. The schema is automatically included with the prompt.
create.no_model_body: This server has no system-wide LLM configured. You can still run a trial by pointing at any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenAI, Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp…).
create.checking_body: Verifying that {model} works with your schema before starting the trial.
create.discard_message: Your trial configuration will be lost.

status.verifying: Verifying model works with your schema…
status.verified_ready: Model verified with this schema — ready to start.
status.will_check: Model will be checked when you start the trial.

toast.start_failed: Could not start the trial. Please try again.

metadata.description_placeholder: Short summary for this trial (e.g. doc type, goal, changes etc)

select.model_help: Models are loaded from your configured LLM provider. Not all models support structured JSON output — the compatibility test below verifies your chosen model works with the selected schema before you run the trial.
select.model_help_tooltip: The AI model used for extraction. Models are fetched from your LLM provider (system default or your custom API settings). The list shows raw model IDs from the provider; use the compatibility test to confirm a model can produce structured output matching your schema.

toast.load_group_docs_failed: Failed to load documents for this group
toast.selected_recent: Selected {count} documents from the last {days} days

advanced.max_tokens_help: Limit the maximum tokens for model responses. Leave empty to use model defaults.
advanced.temperature_help: Controls randomness. Lower values make outputs more focused; higher values make them more random. Typical: 0.0–1.0
advanced.reasoning_help: Hints the model how much compute to spend on chain-of-thought/reasoning. Not all models/APIs support this.

model_test.title: Model & Schema Compatibility
model_test.warning_help: The model is checked automatically when you start the trial — or test it now to confirm compatibility beforehand.

results.no_results_title: No results available for this trial.
results.wait: Please wait for the trial to complete.

toast.no_loaded_result: No loaded result for this document — it may have failed before producing one, or is on another page.

viewer.no_structured_result: This document has no structured result.
viewer.no_source: No original file or extracted text for this document.
viewer.no_output: No structured output for this document.
viewer.no_reasoning: No reasoning content was captured for this document.

detail.download_partial_title: This trial did not finish — only the successfully extracted documents are included.

doc_errors.show_in_viewer_title: Show this document in the viewer

cancel_modal.title: Cancel Trial
cancel_modal.message: Cancel this running trial? Documents that are still being processed will be stopped.
cancel_modal.keep_yes: Results extracted so far stay available (partial download and review).
cancel_modal.keep_no: Results extracted so far will be discarded and cannot be recovered.

retry_modal.title: Retry Trial
retry_modal.message: Start a new trial run with the same configuration? This will consume LLM credits.
retry_modal.failed_only_desc: Creates a new trial that processes just the documents that failed.
retry_modal.all_desc: Processes every document again, including the ones that already succeeded.

download.title: Download Trial Results
download.partial_note: This trial did not finish successfully. The download contains only the {count} document(s) that were extracted — documents that failed are not included.
download.format_json_zip: JSON (per-document): Downloads a ZIP archive with one JSON file per document.Each file includes all extracted results, full document metadata, preprocessing configuration, and trial configuration.
download.format_csv_zip: CSV (with files): Downloads a ZIP archive with the CSV and attached files.The CSV includes all extracted results, full document metadata, preprocessing configuration, and trial configuration.
download.format_csv_flat:
CSV (flat): Downloads a single CSV file, one row per document.
Includes all extracted results, document metadata, preprocessing configuration, and trial configuration.
download.include_content_title: If checked: you will also receive the original document text and files inside the ZIP.
download.include_reasoning_title: If checked: each result also includes the model's reasoning/thinking trace (when the model returned one).
download.include_usage_title: If checked: each result also includes token usage stats (prompt/completion/total tokens) and finish reason.
download.note_csv_content:
Will include original files and full document text inside a ZIP.
Note: Download may be large if your trial contains many files.
download.note_csv_only: Only a single CSV will be downloaded (no files/text included).
download.note_json_content:
Each per-document JSON will contain the extracted document text, and the original source files are bundled in a files/ folder inside the ZIP.
Note: Download may be large if your trial contains many files.
download.note_json_only: The JSON files contain only the extracted results and metadata — no document text or source files.

selector.title: Evaluate Trial
selector.mappings_required_body: Each trial requires field mappings for its specific schema. Trials without mappings will be grayed out.
selector.empty_title: No completed trials available for evaluation
selector.empty_desc: Run some trials first to evaluate them against ground truth
selector.select_desc: Choose from completed trials to compare against your ground truth data.
selector.configure_to_enable: Configure field mappings for "{schema}" schema to enable evaluation

validation.select_trial: Please select a trial to evaluate
validation.no_results: Selected trial has no results to evaluate

selector.reeval_message: This trial was already evaluated{when} against this ground truth. Create another evaluation?
selector.mappings_removed: Field mappings for schema "{schema}" are not configured or have been removed
selector.no_results_run_first: Trial has no results to evaluate. Please run the trial first.
selector.data_consistency: Data consistency issue detected. Some documents or ground truth entries are missing.

toast.configure_first: Configure field mappings for "{schema}" schema first
toast.mappings_required: Field mappings are required but not found. Please configure them first.

errors.file_too_large: The file is too large to upload. Please choose a smaller file.

auth.account_locked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts. Try again later.

core.upload_too_large: Uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size of {limit} bytes.

core.admin_required: Not enough permissions. Admin role required.
core.prompt_required: At least one of system_prompt or user_prompt must be provided

documents.document_in_sets: Document is part of {count} document sets. Remove from sets first.

files.project_forbidden: Not authorized to access this project's files
files.csv_unreadable: This file could not be read as CSV. It may be binary, corrupted, or in an unsupported format. Please re-export it as .csv or .xlsx and try again.
files.xlsx_unreadable: This file is labeled as .xlsx but could not be read as an Excel workbook. It may be corrupted. Please re-export the file as .xlsx or .csv and try again. Quote this ID to your administrator for support: {error_id}
files.xlsx_is_legacy_xls: This looks like a legacy binary Excel file (.xls) even though it is named .xlsx. Preview of binary .xls is not supported — please re-save it as .xlsx or .csv.
files.xls_preview_unsupported: Preview for legacy .xls (binary) files is not supported. Please convert the file to .xlsx or .csv and try again.
files.preview_unsupported_type: Preview not supported for this file type
files.batch_delete_too_many: Cannot delete more than {max_files} files at once (requested {requested}).
files.zip_too_many: Cannot zip more than {max_files} files at once (requested {requested}).
files.same_project: Source and target projects cannot be the same
files.move_too_many: Cannot move more than {max_files} files at once (requested {requested}).
